fields.description: System-managed: set automatically by the booking workflow (submit/payment/cancel). Not edited by hand.
fields.label: Booking Status
fields.options:
Pending Payment
Pending Confirmation
Confirmed
Cancelled
Blocked

fields.description: This flow handles Tank In / Lift Off only. Tank Out is hidden for now.
fields.label: Direction

fields.description: Auto-derived from Direction (billing/crane view): Tank In = Lift Off, Tank Out = Lift On.
fields.label: Lift Type

fields.description: Depot to drop at. Filtered to the chosen Branch.
fields.label: Depot

fields.description: No. dokumen referensi (opsional). Mengalir ke bon, EIR, lalu Cleaning Order & M&R.
fields.label: Reff Doc

fields.description: Tank owner. The container picker on each line is filtered to this customer's tanks.
fields.label: Principal / Tank Owner

fields.description: Tank In = Lift Off (drop at depot), Tank Out = Lift On (take from depot).
fields.label: Pricing & Payment

fields.description: System-resolved from the customer's active contract / price list (mirrored onto the Customer default). Drives the Lift Rate currency (USD / IDR) — no exchange-rate conversion. Not picked by hand.
fields.label: Price List

fields.description: Lift service (Lift Off / Lift On), priced in the customer's active price list.
fields.label: Lift Service

fields.description: Resolved from the customer's price list for the chosen lift service.
fields.label: Lift Rate

fields.description: Number of containers added to this booking — the lift charge is billed per container.
fields.label: Qty (Container)

fields.description: Lift Rate × Qty (Container) — the lift amount billed on the Sales Invoice.
fields.label: Lift Amount

fields.description: Currency of the customer's price list (drives Lift Rate formatting).
fields.label: Currency

fields.description: Auto-resolved from the customer's active contract; drives tariff and payment mode.
fields.label: Contract

fields.description: Narrowed to the customer's contract mode. Cash must be paid before approval; TOP accrues and is billed per terms.
fields.label: Payment Type

fields.description: Tracks the Sales Invoice for Cash bookings. Hidden for TOP (billed later via consolidated billing). Set to Cancelled when the booking is voided/cancelled.
fields.label: Payment Status

fields.description: Delivery Order reference. Required before Submit to confirm the booking; a draft may be saved without it.
fields.label: DO Reference

fields.description: Scan / PDF of the Delivery Order. Required before Submit.
fields.label: DO Document

fields.description: At least one container row is required — on a draft and to submit.
fields.label: Containers
